description_long: This is a vintage-style wooden nightstand painted in a distressed blue finish, giving it a rustic and weathered appearance. The nightstand features three drawers on one side, each adorned with round brass knobs and a subtle pink floral heart motif on the drawer fronts. The opposite side is open, with a single decorative turned leg and a plain support, creating an asymmetrical design. The top surface is flat and spacious, suitable for placing lamps, books, or other small items. The legs are turned and add a classic touch, while the base is solid and slightly raised. The overall construction suggests it is sturdy and functional, with a blend of decorative and utilitarian elements.
description: A rustic blue wooden nightstand with three brass-knobbed drawers featuring pink floral heart motifs and turned legs, combining decorative and functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open side with a single turned leg and the solid base.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain blue panel and the depth of the nightstand.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the three drawers with brass knobs and pink floral heart motifs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing two turned legs and the solid blue panel.
attribute_leg_design: turned wooden legs with one plain support
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: against a wall or beside a bed
